final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for OPPO Find X9 Ultra, a full-screen brand announcement.

Style/medium: bold commercial advertising, high-impact brand exposure, photorealistic product shot
Composition: full-screen vertical layout optimized for 1080×1920, centered product hero, generous breathing room for brand impact
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone, sleek modern design, premium finish, screen glowing with UI
Scene/backdrop: minimal gradient or abstract tech background, subtle light rays, clean and uncluttered to maximize brand focus
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with strong rim light, high contrast, premium and aspirational mood
Color palette: OPPO brand orange as accent against deep blacks and silvers, high contrast for visual punch
Materials/textures: brushed metal frame, glass back with subtle reflection, crisp screen display
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Ultra"
Constraints: must read clearly at thumbnail size; maintain brand recognition at 1080×1920 resolution
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark, excessive text, low contrast
